page_metadata.biotools__summary: Considers the physicochemical variation present in a column of a protein sequence alignment and, on the basis of this variation, predicts the impact of all possible amino acid substitutions on the function of the protein.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Considers the physicochemical variation present in a column of a protein sequence alignment and, on the basis of this variation, predicts the impact of all possible amino acid substitutions on the function of the protein.
